items: Find currently recruiting clinical trials on ClinicalTrials.gov for HER2-positive metastatic breast cancer patients treated with HER2-targeted antibody-drug conjugates. Phase II or Phase III interventional trials мң„мЈјлЎң NCT ID, title, phase, status, sponsor, intervention, primary endpointлҘј м •лҰ¬н•ҙмӨҳ.

Find recruiting clinical trials on ClinicalTrials.gov for EGFR-mutant non-small cell lung cancer after osimertinib progression. Include trials involving EGFR inhibitors, MET inhibitors, antibody-drug conjugates, or combination targeted therapy. кІ°кіјлҘј phase, intervention, eligibility summary кё°мӨҖмңјлЎң м •лҰ¬н•ҙмӨҳ.

Find currently recruiting clinical trials for relapsed or refractory diffuse large B-cell lymphoma(DLBCL) using bispecific antibodies such as glofitamab, epcoritamab, or mosunetuzumab. ClinicalTrials.gov кё°л°ҳмңјлЎң trial status, locations, sponsor, primary outcome, key eligibility criteriaлҘј м •лҰ¬н•ҙмӨҳ.

HER2 м–‘м„ұ м „мқҙм„ұ мң л°©м•”(HER2-positive metastatic breast cancer) нҷҳмһҗлҘј лҢҖмғҒмңјлЎң н•ҳлҠ” randomized Phase II мһ„мғҒмӢңн—ҳ protocol synopsisлҘј мһ‘м„ұн•ҙмӨҳ. лҢҖмғҒмһҗлҠ” prior trastuzumab-containing regimen мқҙнӣ„ disease progressionмқҙ нҷ•мқёлҗң м„ұмқё нҷҳмһҗлЎң м„Өм •н•ҳкі , investigational HER2-targeted antibody-drug conjugateмҷҖ physician's choice therapyлҘј л№„көҗн•ҙмӨҳ. Primary endpointлҠ” ORR by RECIST v1.1, secondary endpointsлҠ” PFS, OS, DoR, DCR, safety, QoLлЎң м„Өм •н•ҙмӨҳ.

EGFR exon 19 deletion лҳҗлҠ” L858R mutationмқҙ мһҲлҠ” advanced non-small cell lung cancer(NSCLC) нҷҳмһҗлҘј лҢҖмғҒмңјлЎң, osimertinib мқҙнӣ„ progressionн•ң нҷҳмһҗм—җкІҢ мӮ¬мҡ©н•  investigational targeted therapyмқҳ Phase II, multicenter, single-arm clinical trial protocol synopsisлҘј мһ‘м„ұн•ҙмӨҳ. Primary endpointлҠ” ORR, secondary endpointsлҠ” PFS, OS, DoR, safetyлЎң м„Өм •н•ҳкі , CNS metastases кҙҖл Ё eligibility criteriaлҸ„ нҸ¬н•Ён•ҙмӨҳ.

Relapsed or refractory diffuse large B-cell lymphoma(DLBCL) нҷҳмһҗлҘј лҢҖмғҒмңјлЎң bispecific antibodyмқҳ мң нҡЁм„ұкіј м•Ҳм „м„ұмқ„ нҸүк°Җн•ҳлҠ” Phase II clinical trial protocol мҙҲм•Ҳмқ„ мһ‘м„ұн•ҙмӨҳ. Inclusion criteriaм—җлҠ” ECOG 0вҖ“2, prior anti-CD20 therapy, measurable diseaseлҘј нҸ¬н•Ён•ҳкі , safety monitoringм—җлҠ” CRS, ICANS, infection risk, cytopenia monitoringмқ„ нҸ¬н•Ён•ҙмӨҳ.

prompts.topic: мһ„мғҒмӢңн—ҳ н”„лЎңнҶ мҪң мҙҲм•Ҳ кІҖнҶ н•ҳкё°
items: [Regulatory кҙҖм җ] HER2-positive metastatic breast cancer нҷҳмһҗ лҢҖмғҒ investigational HER2-targeted ADC Phase II protocolмқ„ ICH-GCP, FDA, EMA кҙҖм җм—җм„ң regulatory review н•ҙмӨҳ. нҠ№нһҲ ORR primary endpointмқҳ м Ғм Ҳм„ұ, RECIST v1.1 assessment, independent central review н•„мҡ”м„ұ, cardiotoxicity, ILD/pneumonitis monitoring, AE/SAE reporting timeline, informed consent processлҘј кІҖнҶ н•ҙмӨҳ.

[PI кҙҖм җ] HER2-positive metastatic breast cancer Phase II protocolмқ„ PI кҙҖм җм—җм„ң scientific review н•ҙмӨҳ. Study rationale, ORR primary endpointмқҳ мһ„мғҒм Ғ мқҳлҜё, PFS/OS secondary endpointмқҳ м Ғм Ҳм„ұ, physician's choice comparatorмқҳ нғҖлӢ№м„ұ, prior HER2-directed therapy heterogeneity, CNS metastases eligibility кё°мӨҖмқ„ кІҖнҶ н•ҙмӨҳ.

[Site кҙҖм җ] HER2-positive metastatic breast cancer Phase II protocolмқ„ мӢӨм ң лі‘мӣҗ siteм—җм„ң мҲҳн–үн•ңлӢӨкі  к°Җм •н•ҳкі  site feasibility reviewлҘј н•ҙмӨҳ. Visit schedule, CT/MRI imaging frequency, LVEF monitoring, CBC/chemistry lab schedule, QoL questionnaire burden, CRC workload, investigational product storage and accountability, patient travel burdenмқ„ кІҖнҶ н•ҙмӨҳ.

prompts.topic: нҷҳмһҗ м •ліҙлҘј мһ…л Ҙн•ҳм—¬ л§һм¶Өнҳ• мһ„мғҒмӢңн—ҳ м •ліҙ м°ҫкё°
items: A 60-year-old female with HER2-positive metastatic breast cancer, IHC 3+, prior trastuzumab and pertuzumab exposure, prior T-DM1, no prior trastuzumab deruxtecan, ECOG 1, LVEF 56%, measurable lung metastasis, stable treated CNS metastasis, no ILD history. нӣ„ліҙ мһ„мғҒмӢңн—ҳмқҳ inclusion/exclusion criteriaмҷҖ л№„көҗн•ҙм„ң eligibility matching reportлҘј мһ‘м„ұн•ҙмӨҳ.

A 67-year-old patient with metastatic castration-resistant prostate cancer(mCRPC), BRCA2 mutation, prior abiraterone and docetaxel treatment, ECOG performance status 1, adequate renal and hepatic function. мқҙ нҷҳмһҗк°Җ PARP inhibitor лҳҗлҠ” targeted therapy trialм—җ м Ғн•©н•ңм§Җ inclusion/exclusion criteria кё°мӨҖмңјлЎң л§Өм№ӯн•ҙмӨҳ.

A 54-year-old male with relapsed/refractory diffuse large B-cell lymphoma(DLBCL), prior R-CHOP and CAR-T therapy, ECOG 2, grade 2 cytopenia, history of severe infection within 4 weeks. мқҙ нҷҳмһҗмқҳ trial eligibilityлҘј matched inclusion criteria, exclusion risk, missing informationмңјлЎң лӮҳлҲ„м–ҙ м„ӨлӘ…н•ҙмӨҳ.
